player_sprite.notes: Two-frame animated ship sprite used as cursor in control menu

enemy_sprites.name: Enemy Spaceships
enemy_sprites.notes: Appear from center or edges, move in swirling patterns, can shoot or destroy by contact

enemy_sprites.name: Satellites
enemy_sprites.notes: Group of three, gyrate in small circles, shoot at player. Middle one sun-like when basic weapon equipped

enemy_sprites.name: Asteroids
enemy_sprites.notes: Fly straight outward from center, indestructible, award points for shooting

enemy_sprites.name: Laser Beam Generators
enemy_sprites.notes: Two segments with laser beam between, destroying either segment deactivates beam

palette.notes: Animated starfields in background, one-point perspective display

tile_vocabulary.notes: One-point perspective with vanishing point at center of screen. Stars approach from center outward

animation_specs.notes: Ship cursor uses 2-frame animation. Satellites gyrate in small circles. Background starfield animates continuously
